queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating impact of loan duration in months on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Determinants of default associated with the absence of a checking account and their role in reducing credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers linked to critical accounts or existing credits and their empirical contribution to lower default probability.
